item.name: Call confirmed GG - MaleUroTreated - Cef rec and PrEP cards

request.description: Calling this service will display a recommendation for Ceftriaxone 500 mg and an HIV PrEP card

item.name: Call presumptive GC - MaleUroTreated - Cef dose rec and PrEP cards

request.description: Calling this service will display a recommendation to change the dose to 500 mg and an HIV PrEP card
